name: infill
description: Open-source browser extension workspace for Infill.

scripts.build: corepack pnpm --filter @infill/shared build && corepack pnpm --filter @infill/form-brain build && corepack pnpm --filter @infill/profile-vault build && corepack pnpm --filter @infill/extension build
scripts.typecheck: corepack pnpm --filter @infill/shared build && corepack pnpm --filter @infill/form-brain build && corepack pnpm --filter @infill/profile-vault build && corepack pnpm --filter @infill/extension typecheck
scripts.build:chromium: corepack pnpm --filter @infill/shared build && corepack pnpm --filter @infill/form-brain build && corepack pnpm --filter @infill/profile-vault build && corepack pnpm --filter @infill/extension build:chromium
scripts.build:mozilla: corepack pnpm --filter @infill/shared build && corepack pnpm --filter @infill/form-brain build && corepack pnpm --filter @infill/profile-vault build && corepack pnpm --filter @infill/extension build:mozilla
